name: SDR Conversion Performance
description: Per-SDR conversion rates, with lead-quality adjustment so the comparison is fair. Surfaces who needs coaching and what kind: execution, lead-quality, or capacity.
alsoSurfaces: Which SDRs are converting above and below team baseline?
Whose underperformance is execution vs. lead-quality vs. capacity?
How is each SDR's rate trending cohort over cohort?
Which teams are outperforming on the same lead-quality mix?
beforeWeRun: Time period coverage: trailing 60, 90, or 180 days?
Conversion metric: MQL→SQL only, or include MQL→Opportunity?
Lead-quality adjustment: yes (recommended) or raw rates?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Team average rate, outperformer / underperformer / capacity-limited counts.

whatYoullGet.name: SDR leaderboard
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table with all SDR metrics; performance category color-coded.

whatYoullGet.name: Performance scatter
whatYoullGet.desc: Actual rate vs. expected rate (lead-quality-adjusted), with parity reference diagonal.

whatYoullGet.name: Engagement distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Box plot of activities-per-lead distribution per SDR.

whatYoullGet.name: Underperformers with diagnosis
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list naming each underperformer's situation: execution, quality, or capacity.

whatYoullGet.name: Per-SDR trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Multi-line chart with each SDR as a line over weekly cohorts.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your SDR performance dashboard in ~9 min.
